description: Declarative taxonomy of observation methods shipped with the observer. Each entry maps to a hand-written module under crates/idiolect-observer/src/methods/<module>.rs that implements the ObservationMethod trait. The generated module in the same crate re-exports the struct types and provides a METHODS slice + default_methods() constructor for registering the bundled set.

methods.name: correction-rate
methods.description: Per-lens correction counts grouped by reason. Signals translation-quality rumor.

methods.name: encounter-throughput
methods.description: Encounter traffic by kind and downstream result. Signals firehose liveness.

methods.name: verification-coverage
methods.description: Per-lens verification counts by kind, result, and distinct verifiers. Signals formal-channel evidence.

methods.name: lens-adoption
methods.description: Per-lens encounter count and distinct-invoker DIDs. Signals adoption breadth.

methods.name: action-distribution
methods.description: Encounter counts grouped by structured use.action, optionally rolled up through a resolved action vocabulary. Enables 'how many encounters invoked an action subsumed by X?' style queries without substring search.

methods.name: purpose-distribution
methods.description: Encounter counts grouped by structured use.purpose, optionally rolled up through a resolved purpose vocabulary. Parallel to action-distribution; answers 'how many encounters served a purpose subsumed by X?' without substring search.

methods.name: basis-distribution
methods.description: Record counts grouped by basis variant (self-asserted / community-policy / external-signal / derived-from-record / absent), bucketed by record kind. Surfaces first-party vs third-party attribution rates.

methods.name: attribution-chains
methods.description: Counts of dev.idiolect.belief records by holder DID and by subject at-uri. Surfaces labeler coverage over the firehose and records that attract many third-party attributions.
